message:
🌱 Add podman-desktop: Podman Desktop setup failed on requirement check: WSL mission (#1261)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "podman-desktop-4982-podman-desktop-setup-failed-on-requirement-check-wsl-version",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "podman-desktop: Podman Desktop setup failed on requirement check: WSL version should be >= 1.2.5.",
+    "description": "Podman Desktop setup failed on requirement check: WSL version should be >= 1.2.5.. Requested by 6+ users.",
+    "type": "deploy",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current podman-desktop deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your podman-desktop version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n podman-desktop -l app.kubernetes.io/name=podman-desktop\nhelm list -n podman-desktop 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working podman-desktop installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review podman-desktop configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant podman-desktop configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n podman-desktop -l app.kubernetes.io/name=podman-desktop\nkubectl get configmap -n podman-desktop -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=podman-desktop\n```\n### Bug description\n\nI tried to install Podman Desktop on my Windows 11 machine. I have enabled Virtualization and WSL2, yet it is failed at WSL version check. I've made sure that WSL2 is installed (wsl version check provided below)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Podman Desktop setup failed on requirement check: WSL…",
+        "description": "it is detected as invalid command.\nperhaps the command has been deprecated?\n\nwhat was the expected output of `wsl --version`?\n\n```\n> wsl --version\nInvalid command line option: --version\nCopyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n\nUsage: wsl.exe [Argument] [Options...]\n```yaml\n❌ WSL Version\n\nDetails:\nWSL version should be >= 1.2.5.\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade podman-desktop to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade podman-desktop:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade podman-desktop podman-desktop/podman-desktop --namespace podman-desktop\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n podman-desktop\nhelm list -n podman-desktop\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n podman-desktop -l app.kubernetes.io/name=podman-desktop\nkubectl get events -n podman-desktop --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Podman Desktop setup failed on requirement check: WSL…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "it is detected as invalid command.\nperhaps the command has been deprecated?\n\nwhat was the expected output of `wsl --version`?\n\n```\n> wsl --version\nInvalid command line option: --version\nCopyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "❌ WSL Version\n\nDetails:\nWSL version should be >= 1.2.5.",
+        "> wsl --status\nDefault Distribution: Ubuntu-22.04\nDefault Version: 2\n\nWindows Subsystem for Linux was last updated on 11/23/2023\nWSL automatic updates are on.\n\nKernel version: 5.10.16",
+        "> wsl --version\nInvalid command line option: --version\nCopyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n\nUsage: wsl.exe [Argument] [Options...] [CommandLine]\n\nArguments for running Linux binaries:\n\n    If no command line is provided, wsl.exe launches the default shell.\n\n    --exec, -e <CommandLine>\n        Execute the specified command without using the default Linux shell.\n\n    --\n        Pass the remaining command line as is.\n...\n<truncated>"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
